title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. zerbanum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. zerbanum, also known as the lesser hawkweed or Hieracium zerbanum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. zerbanum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Hieracium lachenalii subsp. zerbanum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
